name: Skills and Slimes
detailed_description:
Survive Slimeageddon in This Auto-Battler Roguelite!

The year is 20XX. A cataclysmic meteor strike has decimated humanity and twisted survivors into monstrous creatures. As a lone genetic researcher, you emerge from your underground bunker into a world ravaged by Slimeageddon. Fortunately, you've discovered the key to survival: control over the slimes!

Harness Slime DNA to Unleash Epic Skills

Skills and Slimes is an addictive auto-battler roguelite with a unique twist. Explore the wasteland as a humble slime and gather DNA to fuel your evolution. Unlock powerful abilities from an expansive skill tree, brimming with over 1,000 unique skills and synergistic combinations. Each run offers a fresh start, allowing you to experiment with countless character builds and strategic approaches.

Discover And Customize Microorganisms

Find microorganisms that will help you permanently solidify your build. Each microorganism can have up to 4 affixes that can be added, discarded, and upgraded at will. Microorganisms can be equipped directly to your slime through a Tetris style inventory system where microorganisms can be flipped 360 degrees. Can you fit just one more piece? It'll make you 10 times stronger if you do!

Chase Golden Microorganisms

Chase golden microorganisms through the boss mutation system. Control your odds on a golden drop by adding more materials and making the boss even stronger. Remember the more materials you add the stronger the boss and the higher chance for a gold drop so make sure your build is just right before you go in. 

Master the Slime, Save Humanity!

Inspired by games like Vampire Survivors, Skills and Slimes combines fast-paced action with deep strategic customization. Will you master the art of slime manipulation, preserve your sanity, and become humanity's last hope? Dive into this thrilling adventure, where every run is a new opportunity to conquer the slime apocalypse!
